page_metadata.biotools__summary: IMGT/DomainGapAlign is the IMGT® tool for the analysis of amino acid sequences of variable (V), constant (C) or groove (G) domains. Analysis is based on the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concepts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: IMGT/DomainGapAlign is the IMGT® tool for the analysis of amino acid sequences of variable (V), constant (C) or groove (G) domains. Analysis is based on the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concepts.
